mapper.sql: t.id, t.delivery_appointment_id, t.delivery_appointment_no, t.order_id, t.appointment_status, t.delivery_mode, t.appointment_time, t.appointment_place, t.appointment_store_code, t.contact_name, t.contact_mobile_encrypted, t.reschedule_reason, t.cancel_reason, t.operator_id, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_delivery_appointment t WHERE t.order_id = #{orderId} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_delivery_appointment t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_delivery_appointment t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.order_id = #{params.orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_delivery_appointment ( delivery_appointment_id, delivery_appointment_no, order_id, appointment_status, delivery_mode, appointment_time, appointment_place, appointment_store_code, contact_name, contact_mobile_encrypted, reschedule_reason, cancel_reason, operator_id, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{deliveryAppointmentId}, #{deliveryAppointmentNo}, #{orderId}, #{appointmentStatus}, #{deliveryMode}, #{appointmentTime}, #{appointmentPlace}, #{appointmentStoreCode}, #{contactName}, #{contactMobileEncrypted}, #{rescheduleReason}, #{cancelReason}, #{operatorId}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_delivery_appointment ( delivery_appointment_id, delivery_appointment_no, order_id, appointment_status, delivery_mode, appointment_time, appointment_place, appointment_store_code, contact_name, contact_mobile_encrypted, reschedule_reason, cancel_reason, operator_id, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.deliveryAppointmentId}, #{item.deliveryAppointmentNo}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.appointmentStatus}, #{item.deliveryMode}, #{item.appointmentTime}, #{item.appointmentPlace}, #{item.appointmentStoreCode}, #{item.contactName}, #{item.contactMobileEncrypted}, #{item.rescheduleReason}, #{item.cancelReason}, #{item.operatorId}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_delivery_appointment t SET
t.appointment_status = #{appointmentStatus},
t.appointment_time = #{appointmentTime},
t.appointment_place = #{appointmentPlace},
t.reschedule_reason = #{rescheduleReason},
t.cancel_reason = #{cancelReason},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_delivery_appointment t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
